title: Lookup form pattern (custom lookup form)
instruction: In the sandbox model, create a Lookup form named DemoNoteHeaderLookup bound to the ConDemoNoteHeader table's data source, with grid controls for NoteId and Subject, auto-generated via the form scaffold pattern (formPattern=Lookup). The form must build clean. Note: there is no dedicated 'Lookup' template in the form-pattern catalog as of 2026-07-01 -- the scaffold tool substitutes 'LookupGridOnly' and reports this explicitly. That is expected, not an error.
